title: 有馬記念の後に・有馬の顔は……

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... won, right?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... actually won?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Trainer...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: None of this feels real... Did I really win?

text_block_list.name: Spectators
text_block_list.text: Nice Natuuure! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Whoa... There are so many people...

text_block_list.name: Everyone from the Shopping District
text_block_list.text: Natiiiiie! Congratulations!

text_block_list.name: Shopkeeper A
text_block_list.text:
This is it! This is the moment we've all been
waiting for! The win you deserve!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Everyone from the shopping district is here too...
I'm glad they could see this.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
They all waited for this moment. I finally managed
to deliver.
choice_data_list: Yup, but you're the one who did it. You grasped your dreams.
Yup, but you're the one who did it. You grasped your dreams.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Waaah! Trainer!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
I'm so glad I didn't give up! I'm glad I kept chasing
my dream!

These tears are not the tears of anxiety she
showed me once before. These happy tears
glisten together with her sweat in the light of the
sun.
And then...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Come on, why are you crying?!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Oh, Teio...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: You're number one now! You just beat me! ME!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Rrrgh... So smile proudly like a true winner!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sniff. You're right. You were always smiling too...

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Sorry, I'm okay. I'm done crying.

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Good. If you cry, you won't be able to hear—

text_block_list.name: Crowd
text_block_list.text: Yeeeeaaah! Natureeee!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
—these massive cheers! They're all for you, you
know!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I know. I'm listening... I can hear them!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text: Phew...

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
You really do have what it takes to be amazing...
Grrr!

text_block_list.name: Tokai Teio
text_block_list.text:
But I won't let you get in front of me again. Next
time, I won't lose!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Thank you, Teio.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
If it wasn't for you, I wouldn't be able to run like I
can now.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Thank you for letting me chase you all this time. It
was honestly difficult.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... at the same time, it felt really good.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
From now on though, I'll be the one leading on
the backstretch.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: As the main character of my story!

Nice Nature lights up in the flashes of cameras
during the post-race winner interview.

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text:
This year's Arima Kinen was full of tough rivals.
What do you think gave you the power to come
out on top?

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: It sure was... Everyone was really, really fast.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
But I'm pretty fast myself. I think I won because I
gave it my all.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: Yeah... That's definitely why I won!

text_block_list.name: Reporter A
text_block_list.text: Finally, please give us a few words for the fans!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Umm, I'd like to say thank you to everyone who's
been cheering for me from the beginning.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
You kept supporting me for simply being me,
even through times when I couldn't give you
anything to show for it.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
It's thanks to you that I've made it here... It wasn't
an easy road, though!

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: ...I hope it's all right if I ask you all for a favor.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I... I want you guys to keep supporting me.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
Of course, there will be times when I'm not in
good shape or don't do well.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text:
After all, I'm not particularly talented or some
super hard worker.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: But... I think I can say one thing.

text_block_list.name: Nice Nature
text_block_list.text: I'm the last runner who will ever let you down!
